provenance_notes: REGENERATED COMPARISON. The original V18 comparison paired the original Claude V18 score (score_claude_V18_001, 145s/451) against the V18 GPT-4o score (162.9s/433.6). That comparison is invalid because the original Claude score was actually describing V_8.mov (SURG20 wall-mount), not V18.MOV (SURG25 desk-mount). This regenerated comparison uses the corrected Claude score (score_claude_V18_002_corrected, 163s/434).

deltas.agreement_notes: After correcting the original Claude V18 mis-scoring, the two teachers agree to within 0.4 FLS and 0.1s on completion time. Tightest agreement in the V-series.

suture_cut.note: FASTEST CUT PHASE IN THE ENTIRE V-SERIES at 6.7s. Previous best ~26s in V14.

reconciled.reasoning: Teacher delta is effectively zero (0.4 FLS). Reconciled score is the midpoint.

out_of_rubric_quality_notes.cutting_breakthrough: 6.7s cut phase is a series record.
out_of_rubric_quality_notes.throw_regression: 97s combined on throws 2+3 is a regression from V11-V14 peak.

cross_station_context: V18.MOV is at the SURG25 desk-mount RCA station. Distinct from the V11-V14 RCA lab and the SURG20 wall-mount station (V_8, V15, V17).
